hook.text: UNITED LEGEND BECKHAM GETS WALK OF FAME STAR

beats.text: BECKHAM WON SIX LEAGUE TITLES IN UNITED RED
THE TREBLE HERO HONOURED IN LOS ANGELES
TOM CRUISE AND VICTORIA SPOKE AT THE CEREMONY
HIS STAR IS NUMBER 2849 ON THE BOULEVARD

caption: United legend Sir David Beckham received the 2,849th star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame — honoured for taking football global and bringing 'soccer' to America. Victoria and Tom Cruise were among the speakers. Six Premier League titles. The 1999 Treble. Becks belongs in Hollywood. 🔴 What's your favourite Beckham moment in a United shirt?
